nasb.text: Then the Lord said to me, ‘Arise, proceed on your journey ahead of the people, that they may go in and possess the land which I swore to their fathers to give them.’

esv.text: And the Lord said to me, ‘Arise, go on your journey at the head of the people, so that they may go in and possess the land, which I swore to their fathers to give them.’

cnv.text: 耶和華對我說：‘你起來，走在人民的前面，使他們可以進去，得著我向他們列祖起誓賜給他們的那地。’

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说，‘起来，带他们走吧，去占领我起誓赐给他们祖先的土地。’
